title: BEM-635 Telegram smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

sender=scripts/'telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.py'
sender.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import http.client',
'import json',
'import os',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'OUT = Path("governance/state/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.md")',
'def present(v):',
'    return bool(str(v or "").strip())',
'def main():',
'    token = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", "")',
'    chat_id = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID", "")',
'    text = "BEM-635 | TELEGRAM DIRECT DELIVERY SMOKE | Канал доставки проверяется автономно"',
'    result = {"schema_version":"telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.v1","status":"not_run","has_token":present(token),"has_chat_id":present(chat_id),"http_status":None,"delivery_confirmed":False,"blocker":None}',
'    if not present(token) or not present(chat_id):',
'        result["status"] = "missing_secret"',
'        result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_SECRET_MISSING","has_token":present(token),"has_chat_id":present(chat_id)}',
'    else:',
'        try:',
'            params = "chat_id=" + chat_id + "&disable_web_page_preview=true&text=" + text.replace(" ", "%20").replace("|", "%7C")',
'            conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.telegram.org", timeout=30)',
'            conn.request("POST", "/bot" + token + "/sendMessage", body=params, headers={"content-type":"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"})',
'            resp = conn.getresponse()',
'            raw = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")',
'            result["http_status"] = resp.status',
'            result["response_preview"] = raw[:300]',
'            if resp.status == 200 and "ok" in raw:',
'                result["status"] = "sent"',
'                result["delivery_confirmed"] = True',
'            else:',
'                result["status"] = "http_not_ok"',
'                result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_HTTP_NOT_OK","http_status":resp.status,"response_preview":raw[:300]}',
'        except:',
'            result["status"] = "runtime_error"',
'            result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_SMOKE_RUNTIME_ERROR"}',
'    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    REPORT.write_text("# Telegram Direct Delivery Smoke" + SEP + SEP + "Status: " + result["status"] + SEP + "Delivery confirmed: " + str(result["delivery_confirmed"]) + SEP + "HTTP status: " + str(result.get("http_status")) + SEP + "Blocker: " + ("null" if result.get("blocker") is None else json.dumps(result.get("blocker"), ensure_ascii=False)) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps({"status": result["status"], "delivery_confirmed": result["delivery_confirmed"]}, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()'
])+sep)

workflow=wfs/'telegram-direct-delivery-smoke.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Telegram Direct Delivery Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/telegram-direct-delivery-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: telegram-direct-delivery-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  telegram-direct-delivery-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check direct smoke
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.py

      - name: Run direct Telegram smoke
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: python3 scripts/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.py

      - name: Commit direct smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.json governance/reports/telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-635 Telegram direct delivery smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

trigger=triggers/'telegram_direct_delivery_smoke.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-635 trigger telegram direct delivery smoke 2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'+sep)
protocol=protocols/'TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_PROOF_LAYERS.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-635 | Telegram Delivery Proof Layers'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Delivery proof has two layers:'+sep+'1. Direct smoke: checks bot token/chat delivery without hourly renderer.'+sep+'2. Hourly renderer delivery: checks canonical report workflow.'+sep+sep+'If direct smoke passes but hourly delivery fails, the blocker is renderer/workflow. If direct smoke fails, the blocker is Telegram credentials/chat/network.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'telegram_direct_delivery_smoke_setup.v1','bem':'BEM-635','status':'created_and_triggered','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(sender),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem635_direct_telegram_delivery_smoke.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem635_direct_telegram_delivery_smoke.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-635 | Direct Telegram Delivery Smoke | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created and triggered direct Telegram delivery smoke workflow.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem635_direct_telegram_delivery_smoke','cycle_id':'bem635-direct-telegram-delivery-smoke','source':'gpt_executor','status':'created_and_triggered','workflow':str(workflow),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem635_direct_telegram_delivery_smoke']={'status':'created_and_triggered','workflow':str(workflow),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['telegram_delivery_proof_layer']='direct_smoke_triggered'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:47 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem635_direct_telegram_delivery_smoke.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-635 PASS: direct Telegram delivery smoke workflow created and triggered.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(sender),str(workflow),str(trigger),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created and triggered direct Telegram delivery smoke workflow to isolate delivery channel from hourly renderer')
"""
No issue comments.
